text: Machine learning is a type of artificial intelligence where computers learn from data. One common method is supervised learning. In this approach, we provide the computer with training data, which includes both input information and the correct answers. The computer uses this data to build a model, which is like a set of rules or patterns it discovers. Once the model is ready, it can make predictions on new, unseen data. For example, a model trained on photos of cats and dogs can predict whether a new photo shows a cat or a dog. The accuracy of these predictions depends on the quality and amount of training data.
